task_description: Implement Wave 3 final features for Virtual-SIA: Agent Identity Governance (H9) and Paradigm Forking / Self-Redesign, with full Arabic documentation and tests

verification.summary: 285 tests pass (234 original + 30 identity governance + 21 paradigm fork). All features gated behind False defaults. Semantic review v1 found 6 issues - 2 actionable (doc threshold mismatch + wrong file references) fixed, 4 architectural observations documented as known limitations.
